arts.ttl: Bologna-Napoli will bring matchday 31 to a close
arts.sum: Bologna have won their last five league games; only three times previously have the Emilians recorded more consecutive wins in their history in Serie A - six between February and March 2024 under Thiago Motta; six between April and May 1967 under Luis Carniglia and 10 between November 1963 and February 1964 under Fulvio Bernardini. After a win against Milan in their most recent match, Napoli could win at least two league games in a row for the first time since between December 2024 and January 2025 (run of 7).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Join Race for Sought-After Bologna Defender
arts.sum: Bologna defender Sam Beukema has emerged as a concrete defensive target for a number of top European clubs, including Inter. According to Spanish outlet Sport, La Liga giants Real Madrid have recently joined the queue. The post Real Madrid Join Race for Sought-After Bologna Defender appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Lewis Ferguson up for Napoli transfer as agent drops Bologna bombshell on eve of Serie A showdown
arts.sum: The 25-year-old is preparing to face his Scotland team-mates Scott McTominay and Billy Gilmour on Monday
